CustomField.description: Succeeding-The date is moved to the immediately following business day. Modified Succeeding-The date is moved to the immediately following business day, provided that the latter is not in a different calendar month. Should that be the case, the date will be moved forward to the immediately preceding business day instead. Preceding-The date is moved to the immediately preceding business day. Modified preceding-The date is moved to the immediately preceding business day, provided that the latter is not in a different calendar month. Should that be the case, the date will be moved to the immediately following business day instead.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Correct the due dates of the Loan Slip and Payable to the first business day before or after the actual due date.
CustomField.label: Due Date / Reset Date Correction
